narratives.Description: In the hybrid world .deft/core becomes gitignored and reconstituted by directive init (the node_modules model), which kills the upgrade churn loop (#1672). This story makes greenfield init write the .deft/core entry into .gitignore so the deposit is born ignored and never committed (no tracked-but-ignored half-state for new users), and makes the deposit idempotently reconstitutable when .deft/core is absent. Per the locked Option B journey split, this story does NOT un-commit an existing tracked deposit; the vendored->hybrid `git rm --cached` transition is owned by #1941.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
- Extend the init-deposit gitignore step (packages/core/src/init-deposit/gitignore.ts) so greenfield init appends the .deft/core ignore entry to the canonical baseline, while preserving the existing selective entries and the EnsureGitignoreLines heal behavior ported from cmd/deft-install setup.go.
- Make the deposit reconstitution idempotent: when .deft/core is absent, init re-copies it from the content package; when present, it is left/refreshed without re-writing the ignore entry.
- Add unit tests for the born-ignored greenfield path, idempotent reconstitution, and the explicit non-un-commit of an already-tracked deposit (asserting #1941 owns that transition).
narratives.UserStory: As a new Deft user, I want .deft/core gitignored and reconstitutable by directive init, so that my repo stays clean of framework-payload churn and the deposit rebuilds like node_modules.

items.title: When greenfield init runs, it creates a .deft/core entry in .gitignore so the deposit is never committed.

narrative.Acceptance: When greenfield init runs, it creates a .deft/core entry in .gitignore so the deposit is never committed.

items.title: When .deft/core is absent, directive init recreates it idempotently from the installed content package.

narrative.Acceptance: When .deft/core is absent, directive init recreates it idempotently from the installed content package.

items.title: When an existing tracked .deft/core deposit is present, init and update leave it tracked and defer the un-commit to #1941.

narrative.Acceptance: When an existing tracked .deft/core deposit is present, init and update leave it tracked and defer the un-commit to #1941.

items.title: When the unit tests run, they cover born-ignored greenfield, idempotent reconstitution, and the non-un-commit behavior.

narrative.Acceptance: When the unit tests run, they cover born-ignored greenfield, idempotent reconstitution, and the non-un-commit behavior.

expected_outputs: .deft/core gitignored on greenfield init; deposit reconstitutable
gitignore module with born-ignored + reconstitution unit tests
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Traced to cmd/deft-install/setup.go (EnsureGitignoreLines / canonicalGitignoreLines) and the #1942 decision-G journey split, not a spec section.

references.title: Issue #1942: TS-native directive init/update deposit + gitignore .deft/core (HARD prereq for Go neuter)
